headline: How The J. M. Smucker (SJM) Investment Story Is Evolving Without New Analyst Targets
summary: J. M. Smucker starts this update with no changes to its current price target, which keeps the stock’s formal analyst outlook steady for now. Even without fresh price target moves or new analyst commentary, the existing targets still frame how professionals are thinking about the company. In the sections that follow, you will see how to track these targets over time and use them to follow the evolving narrative around J. M. Smucker’s stock. Wall Street's queuing for one rocket. headline: Barclays Maintains Equal-Weight on JM Smucker, Raises Price Target to $125
summary: Barclays  analyst Andrew Lazar   maintains JM Smucker (NYSE:SJM) with a Equal-Weight and raises the price target from $103 to $125.

headline: Oxford Industries Posts Mixed Q1 Results, Joins Oracle, Swarmer And Other Big Stocks Moving Lower In Thursday's Pre-Market Session
summary: US stock futures higher, Nasdaq futures up 300 points. Oxford Industries shares fell 6.6% after mixed Q1 results. Other stocks also down in pre-market.
